ground_truth.title: Bold Music Reviews | What Our Family Has to Say
ground_truth.main_content:
Parent Approved

“I think Fred is gifted, super patient, and a talented musician. He has a plan for our boys. When he comes each day, he’s great. Overall, the experience has been wonderful. Really.”

AMY YANCEY
Bold Music Student & Parent

What Parents Are Saying

I went to the open mic and it was a great experience. All of the staff was so nice and helpful. I will definitely be coming back!
Quinn K

George and his Bold music team have been around for a long time, and they all work as a family to provide great inspiration to all age students thru music skills and learning instruments, and become acquainted to live studios, self confidence, and self accomplishment, therefore can be useful for all in living a happy life. Wish I had learned growing up. Congratulations to George and the Bold music team.
Rosa Schiano

We initially chose Bold Music for the convenience of having an instructor come to our home, but we continued to choose Bold year after year for the professional yet personal experience. It’s been a huge positive in their lives and we are grateful!
Stacie Z.

Unbelievable and unforgettable performance. I saw an eight-year-old slaying, an electric guitar, dressed up as Maverick from top gun, with his dad as ice man on the side. So supportive and awesome and amazing and everything. Couldn’t recommend it anymore for your kid, that’s in the music, or if your kids is just the kid.
Fred Sexton

I am thrilled to have found Bold Music! I gave my adult son a gift certificate for lessons for Christmas. He is a lifelong piano player, and music has always been a great outlet and a stress reliever. He immediately connected with his teacher, Payton, and is planning to continue weekly lessons after the gift certificate is used up. I love the fact that Bold music is out in the community with their students, doing events for senior citizens, and also that they have gig nights.
Kathy Peters

I played piano for 13 years as a child and recently picked back up as an adult student in January with Bold. My experience with them has been nothing short of great. Having teachers come to your home allows you the comfort of your own instrument as well as environment you are playing in. I've learned a variety of different techniques that I never learned as a child playing and had the ability to push myself. Teachers are great, ownership will go above and beyond for you any time, and the community they have built is awesome.
Ariail Heath

I started piano lessons a few months ago and I’m hooked! I was a bit trepidatious being in the “over 50 club” learning to play and read music for the first time but my teacher, Payton, has been wonderful. Thank you Bold Music!
Julie Choate

Bold Music is the premier music lesson organization in the greater Charlotte area. George and Dean are all in when it comes to their students and their musical advancement.
Thomas Handy

Our family loves Bold music. Instructors are great and the community is supportive of all levels of musicians. We have a 9 year old and two 6 year olds learning to play the ukulele. They love performing at the many Open mic sessions.
Erik Small

My children are both enrolled and they are loving it! I see them enjoy music and learning so much with singing, playing the guitar, song writing and performing in front of an audience. The best part is the complete support from the staff and the teachers. I could not find a better music school for my kids. Thank you Bold Music!
Valerie Lapham

My 7 year old daughter and I have taken beginner piano lessons for 2 years now with Ms. Ashley and it's been a wonderful experience! We're enjoying learning together!
Molly Goldberg

I am a student of Mars’ and have spent a year and counting with him. Bold allows me to do online lessons very conveniently and they have a wide variety of teachers. Would recommend!
Logan Angelon

I’ve taken lessons for years and I don’t think anyone puts more time and effort into quality music lessons than Bold Music.
Mark Miller

Great company! The owner is thoughtful, caring and explains entire process.
Kris Christopher

Excellent and welcoming environment! The instructors are amazing with young students and do the absolute best to accommodate their needs of their students.
Kevin Endres

Voice lessons are awesome. My instructor is super cool and it’s really convenient not having to drive places for my lessons. Performances are super fun and inclusive, I wouldn’t have it any other way.
Mary Kate Gaughran

Bold Music has been such a wonderful fit for our family! We love our music teachers- they’ve encouraged, taught, and passed along their passion for music to my children- and I’m so very grateful! I highly recommend them!!
Grey Heinzerling (Girhffe)

My 8 year old has been taking voice lessons and my 10 year old son has been taking guitar with Bold for a little over a year. The experience has been fantastic. The instructors are skilled and relate incredibly well to kids, and Bold is very professional with their communications, billing, etc. Top it off with a “Gig night” where kids get up on stage and show off their progress, and you have a 5-star experience!
Will P

Tonight was a super special Gig Night with @boldmusiclessons! Way back in 2019, Isaac joined a preschool…
@lindsgorman

Bold Music has been the utmost supportive of my musical journey!! They offer many amazing performance opportunities to prune the musician and help them grow as a performer!
Anna Rae Haller

George is a great teacher and fosters the love of music with his students! 5 stars
Nan Sutton Howard

Our Daughter attended this camp for several years…. best thing about her summer.
Tamla Boone

Our kids absolutely LOVE their Bold Music teacher. It has been a wonderful experience and they are learning so much!
Jessica Pleasants

My son takes lessons with Mars from Bold. He is an awesome instructor who is great with kids, we couldn’t be happier. Mars has really helped my son learn songs he loves and develop a passion for music.
Chris Moore

Ready to Get Started With Personalized Music Lessons ?

I'm Ready!
